content.en:
"The genius of the Hundred-Eyed Clan!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was going to capture the genius of the Hundred-Eyed Clan and ask about the secrets.

After all, the Battle Gate has not sent anyone into the Holy Gold Realm for a long time, and the information about this place is still stuck in the information of the past, so that kind of information is not applicable to the present.

After all, the Holy Gold Realm is a treasure land, and many treasures here will be taken away, and other treasures will also be born.

Therefore, it is not clear how many opportunities there are here.

......

The Hundred-Eyed Clan was about to travel to a place where there was a chance, and this place was told to him by the elders of his clan.

Once in there, his strength will be improved, and he will not waste this opportunity.

Abrupt.

A figure appeared in front of him.

"You ......"

Just as he was about to say who you were, he suddenly sensed the aura of the other party, which was completely different from the aura of the creatures in the Dark Destruction Domain.

"Practitioner !!!"

Drunken suddenly came to his senses.

In the Dark Destruction Domain, there is no hiding about the cultivators, and many living beings know about the cultivators and the Dark Sanctuary.

In addition, before entering this time, several Supreme Domain Ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain informed that some cultivators had infiltrated the Holy Gold Realm and asked them to find the cultivators and kill them.

It is clear that he met the practitioner.

However, he didn't want to meet it!

He is not stupid, he naturally knows very well that the genius who dares to sneak into the Holy Gold Realm in the Dark Sacred Domain must be very demonic, even if he is weak, if he is placed in the Dark Destruction Domain, he is definitely at the top level.

When he meets such a genius, he will definitely die!

"Run!"

Drunk didn't have the slightest desire to fight, and only thought about escaping.

"Five Elements Ban!"

As soon as this holy technique came out, there was no possibility of escape.

In an instant, Yu Yu was captured, and Xiu Wei was also sealed.

Yu Jiu didn't ask for help from other living beings, so only a few clansmen from the Hundred Eyes Clan came in, and they were not very powerful, not even a double overlimiter, how to fight against Ye Tian.

As for the people of other races, they don't care about him, and he doesn't have contact information!

So.

He can only wait to die!

Next, Ye Tian used the soul holy technique of Zhenshen to constantly destroy the soul of the drunk, so as to interrogate some information.

At first, he was reluctant to say anything, but eventually he said it.

From Yu Jiu's mouth, Ye Tian learned a lot of information, and then crushed Yu Yu's soul again, trying to absorb some memories.

At the level of consummation of the Returning Realm, it is difficult to absorb the memory, unless it is a weaker Returning Realm, it can be easily absorbed by Ye Tian.

For example, the Dragon Shadow Palace Master's kind of return to the One Realm.

Ke Yu is also an overlimiter, and his soul is very powerful, after all, he is also one of the geniuses, otherwise he would not have a chance to enter the Holy Gold Realm.

What's more, almost all of the geniuses of this kind have practiced the secret art of protecting their own memories, and it is difficult to be absorbed from their memories.

In the end, Ye Tian only absorbed a few broken memories, among which there were a few memories attributed to the Holy Gold Realm, and compared them with the content of the interrogation, confirming that the other party was not lying.

"The Destruction Saint Clan has more than a dozen Saint Endowments entering the Holy Gold Realm?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

This is the information that was obtained from the mouth of the drunken, and it is likely to be true.

There are more than a dozen Saints, this is more than the Saints of the Dark Sanctuary!

"What the Fire Tattoo War Ancestor said is right, the Holy Endowment of the Dark Destruction Domain is indeed relatively easy to be born!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Ordinary saints, he doesn't pay attention.

What he cares about is the chance of the Holy Gold Realm, and this is the purpose of his coming to the Holy Gold Realm.

"From the information that this Hundred-Eyed Clan has learned, the first chance in the Holy Gold Realm is still the Golden Ancestor Tablet. But if you want to go to the Ancestor Monument of Jin, you must pass three levels, otherwise you can't go to the Enlightenment. Moreover, there are still ten major opportunities in the Holy Gold Realm, most of which are opportunities for cultivators, and they are not of much help to destroy the Holy Clan and the three thousand evil clans!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But there is no way, the Dark Destruction Domain occupies this place, and it is difficult for the geniuses of the Dark Sacred Domain to enter here, and they must rely on this special token.

Even if the opportunity here is not of much help to the Dark Destruction Domain, they can waste it casually.

In addition to the Golden Ancestor Monument, the greatest opportunity in the Holy Gold Realm is the Dzi Pagoda.

The Dzi Pagoda can release a special kind of energy, with a rare holy object as the source of energy, if you enter the Dzi Pagoda to practice, you can easily cultivate the holy body to the consummation realm.

Of course, if you want to enter the Dzi Tower, you still need to pass the levels.

The Holy Gold Realm was originally created by my invincible ancestor to cultivate geniuses, so it has a level for any useful opportunity.

It's a pity that such an opportunity is useless to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian came to copy the body, even if he could cultivate, the effect of cultivation could not be blessed to the body, so it was useless to copy the body to cultivate the holy body!

But cultivating the Holy Technique is different, if you copy the body and cultivate the Holy Technique to the Perfection Realm, if the main body is re-cultivated, you can easily cultivate the Sacred Technique to the Perfection Realm.

In addition to the Golden Ancestor Tablet, the opportunities that were really useful to Ye Tian were those that could be taken away.

For example, the Holy Medicine Garden!

This place is a real treasure land, which can give birth to the treasure of the forbidden supreme treasure level, this treasure is specially used to improve cultivation, and it is called the semi-holy medicine, and on top of the semi-holy medicine, there is also the holy medicine, and on the holy medicine, there are also ancestral medicine and ancestral medicine.

Of course, the ancestral medicine is almost unobtainable, the semi-holy medicine is more common, and there are some holy medicines, so the ancestral medicine needs to depend on luck.

The birth of each ancestral medicine requires a certain amount of luck.

At the beginning of the Holy Gold Realm, the first treasure place everyone went to must be the Holy Medicine Garden.

Because the opportunity here can be taken away, if you don't come, all the treasures will be taken away, and you will be completely lost.

But the opportunity in other places can't be taken away, and if you go later, it won't have any effect.

"Are you going to the Holy Medicine Garden?"

Ye Tian pondered.

If it was the Holy Medicine Garden, he was afraid that he would need to fight with a large number of geniuses in the Dark Destruction Domain, otherwise he would not be able to grab much Holy Medicine at all.

Moreover, he is a little late now, and there is probably already a scramble.

"Go!"

Ye Tian decided.

The value of the semi-holy medicine is just that, the value of the holy medicine is beyond the forbidden treasure, although it is not as good as the holy relic, but the holy medicine is specially used to improve cultivation, and the value of the ancestral medicine is even higher, I am afraid that it is comparable to the lower holy relic.

Once you grab some, you'll make a lot of money!

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly shuttled towards the Holy Medicine Garden, striving to snatch some more Holy Medicine.

If it's really too late, then kill some of the geniuses of the Dark Destruction Realm and take the Elixir from them.
